text:
BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 
LABEL: 
Reference Year 
DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the reference year of the enrollment data. 
SHORT NAME: RFRNC_YR 
LONG NAME: BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME)) 
VALUES: 
1999 forward 
COMMENT: 
The data files are partitioned into calendar year files. Since the source data originate outside of CMS, 
the update cycle is not the same as the other MBSF segments and does not occur on any regular 
cadence. For
